parameters{

}

source(output(

		RequestedDeferredRemediationDate as timestamp,
		DRDJiraNumber as string,
		StatusFlipCounter as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'with   cte as ( select *  from cooiTracker2.dbo.vSORFeedsPrimary with (nolock) where (((CTOName in (\'Ralph Groce\',\'Rajamanickam Iyer\',\'Robert Okai\',\'Non-Mapped\',\'Jonathan Fein\') or SN_CIO in (\'TECHCOO - TECHNOLOGY CHIEF OPERATING OFFICE\')) and status != \'Active\' and  ValidatedDate between  dateadd(day,-datepart(day,getdate()),DATEADD(m,-12,getdate())) and getdate() and ResponsibleParty = \'APP\'))  union all   select *   FROM [cooiTracker2].[dbo].[vSORFeedsPrimary] with (nolock)  where   (status != \'Active\' and ValidatedDate between  dateadd(day,-datepart(day,getdate()),DATEADD(m,-12,getdate())) and getdate()  and   (TechManagerName in (\'Baohua Qiao\',\'Bart Myszkowski\',\'Bedros Yessaian\',\'David Krausse\',\'Kamalakar Busam\',\'Mikhail Tsionskiy\',\'Rajesh Velamala\',\'Stan Sobol\',\'Pedro Santos\', \'Roberto Reyes\',\'Swetha Manda\') or SN_CIO in (\'TECHCOO - TECHNOLOGY CHIEF OPERATING OFFICE\'))  )    )    select DISTINCT  *    from cte',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> iTrackerQuery	source(output(
		IssueId as long,
		ResearchTeamID as short,
		RemediationTypeID as short,
		ResultsPath as string,

	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from dbo.iTracker_Validated_SN_CIO',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LastValidatedLookupLKPTABLE
iTrackerQuery derive(ImportDate = currentDate()) ~> ImportDate
ImportDate,LastValidatedLookupLKPTABLE lookup(iTrackerQuery@ValidatedDate == LastValidatedLookupLKPTABLE@ValidatedDate && iTrackerQuery@CombID == LastValidatedLookupLKPTABLE@CombID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LastValidatedLookup
LastValidatedLookup select(mapColumn(
		ImportDate = ImportDate@ImportDate,
		IssueId = iTrackerQuery@IssueId,
		ResearchTeamID = iTrackerQuery@ResearchTeamID,
		RemediationTypeID = iTrackerQuery@RemediationTypeID,
